title: CDC: Group A Strep (strep throat) information

Learn More July 31, 2025 Testing There's a quick test to see if someone has strep throat or scarlet fever. Aug. 7, 2025 Prevention Take steps to help protect yourself from group A strep infections. Aug. 7, 2025 Healthcare Providers Healthcare Provider Home Diagnosis, treatment, and prevention options and clinical features vary for each infection. Guidance for Scarlet Fever Guidance on differentiating scarlet fever from viral exanthems. Public Health Professionals Surveillance and Trends CDC uses two systems to track invasive group A strep infections in the United States. July 8, 2024 LTCF Outbreak Investigation Toolkit CDC tools for investigating group A Streptococcus infections in long-term care facilities. Aug. 5, 2025 Active Bacterial Core surveillance (ABCs) Find data, isolates, and resources for ABCs. Outbreaks Public health officials investigate group A Streptococcus outbreaks and identify control measures. Streptococcus Laboratory Homepage for CDC's  ​Streptococcus  ​Laboratory. Group A Strep  Group A strep bacteria can cause many different types of infections including strep throat, scarlet fever, necrotizing fasciitis, and more.
